content.query:
-- CMSUSR Script


SELECT 
  JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CONO') AS [cono]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DIVI') AS [divi]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.USID') AS [usid]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.STAT') AS [stat]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.FVDT') AS [fvdt]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LVDT') AS [lvdt]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LOGL') AS [logl]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TX40') AS [tx40]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LANC') AS [lanc]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ATPG') AS [atpg]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.USTP') AS [ustp]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.MNVR') AS [mnvr]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DFMN') AS [dfmn]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.MNMN') AS [mnmn]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.STMN') AS [stmn]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.AUCM') AS [aucm]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.RCLR') AS [rclr]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.GUIU') AS [guiu]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LSID') AS [lsid]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LSAD') AS [lsad]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DSIM') AS [dsim]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.OFIM') AS [ofim]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.MNLC') AS [mnlc]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.OPTD') AS [optd]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LLID') AS [llid]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.SFID') AS [sfid]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.UOID') AS [uoid]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.AUPF') AS [aupf]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.PDM1') AS [pdm1]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.PDM2') AS [pdm2]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.PDM3') AS [pdm3]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.PDM4') AS [pdm4]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LL01') AS [ll01]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LL02') AS [ll02]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LL03') AS [ll03]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LL04') AS [ll04]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LL05') AS [ll05]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LL06') AS [ll06]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LL07') AS [ll07]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LL08') AS [ll08]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LL09') AS [ll09]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LL10') AS [ll10]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.JBCF') AS [jbcf]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ENAC') AS [enac]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ENCF') AS [encf]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TF14') AS [tf14]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CF14') AS [cf14]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TF15') AS [tf15]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CF15') AS [cf15]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TF16') AS [tf16]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CF16') AS [cf16]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TF17') AS [tf17]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CF17') AS [cf17]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TF18') AS [tf18]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CF18') AS [cf18]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TF19') AS [tf19]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CF19') AS [cf19]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TF21') AS [tf21]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CF21') AS [cf21]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TF22') AS [tf22]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CF22') AS [cf22]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DFCO') AS [dfco]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DFDI') AS [dfdi]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CUNO') AS [cuno]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DEPT') AS [dept]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.FACI') AS [faci]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.WHLO') AS [whlo]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DTFM') AS [dtfm]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.REPF') AS [repf]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.PHNO') AS [phno]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TFNO') AS [tfno]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ADR1') AS [adr1]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ADR2') AS [adr2]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ADR3') AS [adr3]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ADR4') AS [adr4]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ADK1') AS [adk1]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CFI1') AS [cfi1]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CFI2') AS [cfi2]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CFI3') AS [cfi3]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CFI4') AS [cfi4]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CFI5') AS [cfi5]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TIZO') AS [tizo]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TLVA') AS [tlva]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.PATC') AS [patc]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.TXID') AS [txid]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.RGDT') AS [rgdt]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.RGTM') AS [rgtm]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LMDT') AS [lmdt]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CHNO') AS [chno]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CHID') AS [chid]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DCFM') AS [dcfm]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.LMTS') AS [lmts]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.EQAL') AS [eqal]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.USTA') AS [usta]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ULTP') AS [ultp]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.FRF6') AS [frf6]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.FRF7') AS [frf7]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.FRF8') AS [frf8]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.EUID') AS [euid]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CSYS') AS [csys]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.PWHS') AS [pwhs]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.EMAL') AS [emal]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DEVD') AS [devd]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.accountingEntity') AS [accountingentity]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationNumber') AS [variationnumber]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.timestamp') AS [timestamp]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.deleted') AS [deleted]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.archived') AS [archived]

FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/JSON/CMNUSR_*.json',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
        FIELDTERMINATOR ='0x0b',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0a',
        DATA_COMPRESSION = 'GZIP'
    )
    WITH (
        jsonContent varchar(MAX)
    ) AS [result]
WHERE   JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.deleted')='false' and
           JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CONO') 
         + JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DIVI') 
         + JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.USID')
         + JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationNumber') in (

SELECT     JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CONO') 
         + JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DIVI') 
         + JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.USID')
         + MAX (JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationNumber')) AS [IncludeKey]

FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/JSON/CMNUSR_*.json',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
        FIELDTERMINATOR ='0x0b',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0a',
        DATA_COMPRESSION = 'GZIP'
    )
    WITH (
        jsonContent varchar(MAX)
    ) AS [result]

GROUP BY   JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.CONO')
         , JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.DIVI')
         , JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.USID')
)
